login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your details to access the system

errors.token-expired: Your session has expired, please sign in again
errors.invalid-token: Invalid session, please sign in again
errors.unknown: Something went wrong, please try again
errors.invalid-otp: The code is incorrect or already used.
errors.otp-expired: The code has expired, request a new one.
errors.too-many-requests: Too many requests, please try again later.

step1.subtitle: Enter your email to get a reset code.

step2.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email.

step3.subtitle: Set a new password for your account.

step4.title: Password reset
step4.subtitle: You can sign in with your new password.

adminRoster.title: Student roster
adminRoster.subtitle: Manage student enrollment — required before grade entry and attendance.

table.name: Full name
table.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or student ID...
table.selectAll: Select all students on this page

addPanel.title: Add students
addPanel.subtitle: Find and add students to this class.

empty.title: No students yet
empty.body: Add students to begin grade entry and attendance for this class.
empty.addFirst: Add the first student to this class

confirm.unenrollBody: {count} students will be removed from this class. This cannot be undone.
confirm.transferBody: {name} will be transferred from class {fromClass} to this class.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.already-enrolled: Student is already enrolled in another class for this year.
errors.member-not-student: The member does not have the student role.
errors.class-archived: Class has been archived and cannot accept enrollment.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong, please try again

adminSchoolSetup.title: School Setup
adminSchoolSetup.subtitle: Foundational parameters that make EduPortal work for your school.

guide.title: Initial Setup
guide.subtitle: Complete the steps below in order to start using EduPortal.

gradeRange.title: Grade Level Range
gradeRange.subtitle: Defines which grade levels exist at your school. Classes can only be created within this range.
gradeRange.hint: Examples: High School → 10–12 | Lower Sec. → 6–9 | Primary → 1–5. Platform limit: 1 ≤ min ≤ max ≤ 13.
gradeRange.unconfiguredBody: Classes cannot be created until this step is complete.
gradeRange.narrowingBody: Narrowing will be blocked if there are classes outside the new range. Please archive those classes before changing.

publishMode.title: Grade Publish Workflow
publishMode.subtitle: Choose how teachers publish grades to students and parents.

validation.required: Both min and max grades are required.
validation.outOfRange: Grade levels must be between 1 and 13.
validation.minExceedsMax: Min grade must not exceed max grade.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action
errors.narrowing-blocked: Cannot narrow — active classes exist in this range
errors.network-error: Could not reach the server, please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong, please try again.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action
errors.email-exists: Email already exists in the system
errors.invitation-not-found: Invitation not found or has expired
errors.last-admin: Cannot remove the last admin of the organization

select.title: Choose a workspace
select.subtitle: You belong to these organizations
select.empty: You do not belong to any organization yet

home.title: Workspace
home.body: You are inside this organization workspace.

calendar.title: Academic Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Manage academic years and terms for your school

addYear.title: Add new academic year
addYear.subtitle: Once created, expand the year card to configure its terms.
addYear.label: Year label

term.name: Term name
term.noTerms: No terms configured for this academic year yet.
term.deleteBlocked: Term has grade entries — cannot delete

empty.title: No academic years yet
empty.subtitle: Create your first academic year to start configuring terms, teaching schedules and exam periods.

errors.date-order: Start date must be before end date
errors.date-overlap: Term overlaps with another term in this year
errors.graded-term-delete: Cannot delete a term that has grade entries
errors.active-year-exists: An active academic year already exists
errors.year-archived: This academic year has been archived
errors.unknown: Something went wrong, please try again

departments.title: Subject Departments
departments.subtitle: Group subjects by discipline. Departments are the foundation for teacher assignment and position titles.
departments.emptySubtitle: Create your first department to start building your subject catalog.
departments.filteredEmptySubtitle: Try adjusting the filter or clearing your search.
departments.archiveConfirmBody: Archive "{name}"? It will be hidden from new assignment options. Existing data is preserved.

createParentDialog.createSubtitle: Create a new subject group for your school.
createParentDialog.conceptHint: Display label shown in the UI (does not affect functionality).

subjects.title: Subject Catalogue
subjects.subtitle: Departments and grade-scoped subjects
subjects.noDepartmentsSubtitle: Create your first department to start adding subjects.
subjects.selectDepartment: Select a department to view its subjects.
subjects.gradeRangeNote: New subjects must fall within this range.
subjects.archiveBlockedTooltip: Subject is in use — cannot archive
subjects.archiveConfirmBody: Archive "{name}"? It will be hidden from new class creation. Existing data is preserved.
subjects.noGradeRangeBody: Please complete the grade level setup before adding subjects.

createSubjectDialog.title: New subject
createSubjectDialog.subtitle: Each subject is scoped to a single grade level.

subjectDetail.codeHint: Uppercase letters & digits, up to 16 chars.
subjectDetail.lockedBanner: These fields are the curriculum standard — they cannot be changed at the class level. Teachers will see these values when entering grades.
subjectDetail.lockedTooltip: This value flows down to the class level and cannot be edited by teachers.
subjectDetail.classOfferingsEmpty: No classes are using this subject yet.

errors.code-format: Invalid subject code. Use uppercase A–Z and digits 0–9, up to 16 characters.
errors.archive-blocked-parent: Cannot archive a department with active subjects.
errors.archive-blocked-subject: Cannot archive a subject that is assigned to a teacher.
errors.parent-in-use: Department has active subjects and cannot be archived.
errors.parent-forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.grade-level-out-of-range: Grade level is outside this school's configured range.
errors.class-subject-already-exists: Subject is already assigned to this class.
errors.class-subject-locked-field-update: Cannot modify a locked field — this is a master curriculum value.
errors.class-subject-in-use: Cannot archive — subject is in active use in this class.
errors.unknown: An error occurred. Please try again.

timetable.title: Timetable
timetable.subtitle: Click a cell to edit. Teacher conflicts are detected automatically across the school.
timetable.gridScrollHint: Scroll horizontally to see more days

slotEditor.title: Edit slot
slotEditor.subject: Subject
slotEditor.pickSubjectFirst: Pick a subject first to see eligible teachers.
slotEditor.noEligibleTeacher: No teacher is assigned to teach this subject in this class.

conflicts.title: Conflict summary
conflicts.hint: Click a conflict to highlight the cell.
conflicts.validHint: Timetable is valid across the school.

errors.fetch-failed: Could not load the timetable. Please try again.
errors.save-failed: Could not save the slot. Please try again.
